io.papermc.paper.plugin.provider.classloader.PluginClassLoaderGroup

Package
Description
io.papermc.paper.plugin.provider.classloader
 
org.bukkit.plugin.java
Classes for handling plugins written in java.

  • Uses of PluginClassLoaderGroup in io.papermc.paper.plugin.provider.classloader

    Methods in io.papermc.paper.plugin.provider.classloader that return PluginClassLoaderGroup
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    @Nullable PluginClassLoaderGroup
    ConfiguredPluginClassLoader.getGroup()
    Get the plugin classloader group that is used by the underlying classloader
    PluginClassLoaderGroup
    PaperClassLoaderStorage.registerAccessBackedGroup(ConfiguredPluginClassLoader classLoader, ClassLoaderAccess access)
    Registers a paper configured classloader into a new, access backed group.
    PluginClassLoaderGroup
    PaperClassLoaderStorage.registerOpenGroup(ConfiguredPluginClassLoader classLoader)
    Registers a paper configured plugin classloader into a new open group, with full access to the global plugin class loader group.
    PluginClassLoaderGroup
    PaperClassLoaderStorage.registerSpigotGroup(PluginClassLoader pluginClassLoader)
    Registers a legacy spigot PluginClassLoader into the loader storage, creating a group wrapping the single plugin class loader with transitive access to the global group.
